title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Next.js)
description: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead the development of our high-performance, scalable web applications. You will be responsible for architecting complex user interfaces, optimizing rendering strategies, and mentoring junior developers.
requirements: 5+ years of professional experience in frontend web development
Deep expertise in React.js, Next.js, and Server-Side Rendering (SSR)
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, or Context API)
Proven ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental insurance
Generous paid time off (PTO) and sick leave
Latest MacBook Pro and home office setup stipend

title: Full Stack MERN Developer
description: Join our core product team to build and maintain robust APIs and dynamic user interfaces. You will work across the entire stack, from database design to frontend implementation, ensuring seamless integration between our backend services and client applications.
requirements: 3+ years of experience building applications with the MERN stack
Solid understanding of Node.js and Express.js architecture
Experience designing and optimizing MongoDB schemas
Proficiency in building responsive UIs with React
Familiarity with RESTful APIs and GraphQL

title: Mobile App Developer (React Native)
description: We are seeking a React Native Developer to build and deploy cross-platform mobile applications. You will collaborate closely with our design and web engineering teams to translate our web experiences into native-feeling mobile apps for iOS and Android.
requirements: 2+ years of dedicated experience with React Native
Solid understanding of mobile UI/UX principles
Experience with native build tools (XCode, Android Studio)
Familiarity with app store deployment processes (App Store Connect, Google Play Console)
Strong problem-solving and debugging skills

title: Technical Content Creator / Developer Advocate
description: We are looking for a passionate developer who loves to teach. In this role, you will create high-quality technical tutorials, documentation, and video content to help our community of developers learn and succeed with modern web technologies.
requirements: Strong foundation in web development (JavaScript, React, Node.js)
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Experience creating video tutorials or writing technical blog posts
Familiarity with video editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, etc.)
Ability to break down complex technical concepts into easy-to-understand content
benefits: Professional audio and video recording gear provided
Conference and travel budget to attend industry events

title: UI/UX Product Designer
description: We are searching for a talented UI/UX Designer to craft intuitive, accessible, and beautiful interfaces for our digital products. You will own the design process from wireframing and prototyping to final high-fidelity handoffs, ensuring our tools are a joy for our users to navigate.
requirements: 3+ years of experience designing web and mobile applications
Expert-level proficiency in Figma
Strong portfolio demonstrating modern, user-centric design solutions
Solid understanding of typography, color theory, and layout principles
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS to communicate effectively with developers
benefits: Free subscription to learning platforms (e.g., Masterclass, Coursera)
